title: Install Juvo Leads Script
description:
Domain: billallenlaw.com
Summary: Allen Law has onboarded JuvoLeads as a lead management vendor. JuvoLeads has provided Clixsy-specific script installation instructions for the website. The script needs to be installed per the vendor's instructions so JuvoLeads can begin tracking and routing leads from the site.

Client Goal: JuvoLeads is live and tracking leads through the Allen Law website.

Requirements for Completion:
  • JuvoLeads script is installed on billallenlaw.com per vendor tag instructions: https://dashboard.juvoleads.com/agency/tag-instructions.php?website=allenlaw.com
  • Script fires correctly across the site
  • No impact to existing site functionality or performance
Deadline: None stated.

Assets and References:
  • Vendor script instructions: https://dashboard.juvoleads.com/agency/tag-instructions.php?website=allenlaw.com
 
Script:

<!-- Juvo Leads Tag for allenlaw.com -->
<script type="text/javascript">
(function() {
var fd = document.createElement("script"); fd.type = "text/javascript"; fd.async = true;
fd.src = ("https:" == document.location.protocol ? "https://" : "http://") + "cdn.juvoleads.com/tag/9263895398.js?v="+Math.floor(Math.random()*9999999999);
var s = document.getElementsByTagName("script")[0]; s.parentNode.insertBefore(fd, s);
})();
</script>

title: Discussion for Contact Form Update
assignees: Chris Traynor, David Nickerson, Fed, Justyna Acosta, Keith Bruss, Matthew Nyahari
description:
Hi, opening up this discussion task inline with a ticket we got.

Discussion Question: Client confirmed they want to proceed with Gravity Forms (not CallRail forms) and would like our team’s help configuring attribution and Lead Docket integration. Keith, Matthew, can you review the client's request about parameters and let us know how to proceed? Please note, this is not yet a task, as we want to make sure you have everything you need before we formally implement.

Background info:
  • Client is actively auditing lead sources and prioritizing attribution accuracy.
  • Their primary goal is clean, reliable attribution across all lead sources.
  • They are aligned with our recommendation and expect guidance on best-practice setup.
 
URL:  https://billallenlaw.com/

Contact Forms: Home Page Under Header and  Site-wide footer

 

Client-Requested Attribution Parameters:
The client wants to move forward with integrating their Gravity Forms with Lead Docket for attribution. 

Client's quoted question: "Some key parameters I’m interested in (some of them are dependent on how they integrate with Lead Docket): 
  • campaign
  •  current URL
  • referring UR
  •  utm_campaign
  •  utm_source
  •  utm_medium
  •  utm_term
  •  Embed-url?

    Let me know what you think. "

Requested Outcome:
  • Confirm if we can use the parameters provided by the client, so that the AM can let the client know before we implement.
  • If the client agrees with our feedback, then we can configure Gravity Forms to pass the above data into Lead Docket where supported
  • Ensure attribution fields are captured consistently and reliably
  • Flag any parameters that cannot be passed, require custom handling, or need client clarification

Thanks much!

title: Just wanting to confirm
description: I'm, 99.9% certain this is most likely you guys working behind the scenes, but I'd like to be 100% certain when responding to the client's request for confirmation:

title: Exapnsion into Newberry
assignees: Alina Neamtu, Clayton Coombs, Mubeen Dildar-Mia
description:
Could you guys look into this and let me know if you would recommend this or have other recommendations?  

The Gist of It: Lindsay, their CMO, wants to know if they should consider expanding into Newberry and if it would serve their SEO "purposes", as their COO (Nicole) is asking.   

Exact Wording from the client: 
"Nicole has requested Clixsy’s recommendation on expanding our physical presence. 

She would like to know whether a Newberry office would be good for us for SEO purposes.  What areas should we expand to? Would like to start thinking about how that would work.

As you know, Bagen Law Firm is a top competitor, and they just discovered that they have a claimed location in Newberry, Florida. 

If you have any questions or another vendor recommendation to help us with this discovery, please let me know.:"

title: Safely Remove Additional Google Business Profile
description:
Hi, seeking advise regarding a request.

Request: need help with safely removing this GBP: Bill Allen - Gainesville Accident Injury Lawyer.

Ask: Can you please look into it and let us know how to move forward so we can inform their AM.

Thanks much!

---

title: Gainesville GBP Phone Number Removed?
description:
,

On Monday, Jan 26th, someone removed the additional number on the Gainesville GBP, which was set up as their local number for this location.

It is currently the number that is used for NAPW consistency across the website, citations, etc.
We had just finished verifying all of the GBP phone numbers with the client, and updating everything to fit this number...
Re: GBP/Site Phone Number Structure - J394 Allen Law Accident & Injury Lawyers
Update Phone Numbers on Site - J394 Allen Law Accident & Injury Lawyers

This has caused a significant discrepancy; without it, Google can no longer verify that this is the correct local number for this location.


We need your help figuring out what is going on here. Is there now a different number that is unique ONLY to Gainesville to use for NAPW, or are we good to add it back into the GBP.

**Please also be sure to remind the client that they need to let us handle ALL GBP optimizations and updates to avoid any further issues, that could potentially result in triggering a reverification or suspension.

title: Update Careers page hierarchy
description:
Hi, opening this discussion task about a client request.

I have added the verbatim below for reference:
The client is requesting to update the way the career page's heading hierarchy. Please have them review the client's requests and let us know if we can make those changes OR if we need to provide the client with an alternate solution or why it should stay the way it is. I want to make sure our SEO team is able to course-correct the client if their suggested changes aren't beneficial.

client's requested:
 
to be updated with the following that they copy and pasted into the email:

  • Recommended Changes to Current Content:
    • H1: "Careers at Allen Law Firm | Gainesville & Ocala, FL"
    • Add H2 before opening paragraph: "Join Our Mission to Help Injured Floridians"
    • Change H2: "What Makes Allen Law Firm Different?"
    • Change H2: "More Than Just a Job" → "Benefits & Work Environment"
    • Change H2: "Ready to Make a Difference?" → "Apply Today" 
    • Remove H3: "Current Openings" → This section is immediately below the previous H2 


  • Revised Hierarchy:
    • H1: Careers at Allen Law Firm | Gainesville & Ocala, FL
    • H2: Join Our Mission to Help Injured Floridians
    • H2: What Makes Allen Law Firm Different? (added "Firm", for brand consistency)
    • H2: Benefits & Work Environment 
    • H2: Apply Today 

 
Thanks much!

CC

title: GBP/Site Phone Number Structure
description:
Hey Team,

We need to verify the numbers on the GBP and site are properly set up.

WHAT TO DO:
If we have access to their CallRail account, could you please identify what each number below is?
(e.g., GBP tracking, local number, etc.)

Downtown Gainesville, FL - 

Primary - (352) 268-8768
Secondary - (866) 928-6292

Gainesville, FL -

Primary - (352) 436-8727
Secondary -(877) 255-3652
 

Ocala, FL -  

Primary - (352) 306-8665
Secondary - (352) 351-3258


Here is our GBP phone number structure, for reference.

Ideal GBP Phone Number Structure

 
PRIMARY - GBP Call Tracking Number (unique to that GBP) 
- If no GBP call tracking, use local number.
 
SECONDARY- Local Number (unique to that location ONLY)
- Number used on citation listings
- Number should match the phone number on site (the number associated with the NAP in the footer and/or alongside the location's map embeds, etc.) in order to correlate the website and GBP for Google.
 
ADDITIONAL SECONDARY - Main Business Number 
– (optional)
